description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of robe from bw!tch melts like a dollop of cream on the contours of your body and is sure to make you feel relaxed and peaceful. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsRed short length robe with an open placket with tie-up detail to connect both sides, three fourth sleeves with paneling on the cuffsComes with a fabric belt Material and CareSatinHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
